items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a signature certificate with a full chain of custody.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for a signature certificate with a full chain of custody. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm that this requirement is satisfied, nor does it capture any gaps related to the implementation of this feature. The linked use case describes a multi-party sign-off workflow but lacks concrete evidence of the signature certificate being implemented or validated, leading to an inconclusive status.
